baseline.reason: Correctly identifies that negative dctx->remaining is returned (line 359) and flows as next into ff_combine_frame (line 405) at loop line 284. Truncated; does not explicitly mention NULL pointer dereference or that pc->buffer defaults to NULL, which is the actual crash mechanism.
